trans-unit.source: Exercises for Module 7
trans-unit.target: Exercises for Module 7

trans-unit.source: These exercises cover all the content in Module 3.
trans-unit.target: These exercises cover all the content in Module 3.

trans-unit.source: Exercise
trans-unit.target: Exercise

trans-unit.source: Description
trans-unit.target: Description

trans-unit.source: Focus Group
trans-unit.target: Focus Group

trans-unit.source: Estimated time
trans-unit.target: Estimated time

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise Track: Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar](/content/Module_7/en_qgis_module_7_ex1.md):__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise Track: Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar](/content/Module_7/en_qgis_module_7_ex1.md):__

trans-unit.source: This exercise contains the entire exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar"
trans-unit.target: This exercise contains the entire exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar"

trans-unit.source: Data Analysis, Automation, and Map Making
trans-unit.target: Data Analysis, Automation, and Map Making

trans-unit.source: 3 hours
trans-unit.target: 3 hours

trans-unit.source: __[Piste d'Exercice: Analyse d’Action Anticipative pour les Cyclones à Madagascar](/content/Module_7/fr_qgis_module_7_ex1.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Piste d'Exercice: Analyse d’Action Anticipative pour les Cyclones à Madagascar](/content/Module_7/fr_qgis_module_7_ex1.md)__

trans-unit.source: Cet exercice contient la piste d'exercice "Analyse d’Action Anticipative pour les Cyclones à Madagascar" complète.
trans-unit.target: Cet exercice contient la piste d'exercice "Analyse d’Action Anticipative pour les Cyclones à Madagascar" complète.

trans-unit.source: 7 heures.
trans-unit.target: 7 heures.

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise: Automation of Exposed Population Estimation – Aina's Model](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_2.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise: Automation of Exposed Population Estimation – Aina's Model](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_2.md)__

trans-unit.source: This exercise is the second task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". The goal is to build a model to automatically estimate the population exposed to a cyclone event
trans-unit.target: This exercise is the second task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". The goal is to build a model to automatically estimate the population exposed to a cyclone event

trans-unit.source: 3 hours
trans-unit.target: 3 hours

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise: Identifying Affected Health Facilities and Schools – Aina Adds More Layers](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_3.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise: Identifying Affected Health Facilities and Schools – Aina Adds More Layers](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_3.md)__

trans-unit.source: This exercise is the third task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". In this exercise, we will expand the model to obtain further information.
trans-unit.target: This exercise is the third task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". In this exercise, we will expand the model to obtain further information.

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise: Exporting Model Results for the Operations Team](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_6.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise: Exporting Model Results for the Operations Team](/content/Module_7/en_module_7_mdg_aa_ex_6.md)__

trans-unit.source: This exercise is the sixth task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". In this exercise, we will expand the previous model to also output the results in a csv file.
trans-unit.target: This exercise is the sixth task of the exercise track "Anticipatory Action Analysis for Cyclones in Madagascar". In this exercise, we will expand the previous model to also output the results in a csv file.
